mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_email, member_phone, member_nick, member_address, member_status) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{member_pw}, #{member_name}, #{member_email}, #{member_phone}, #{member_nick}, #{member_address}, '정상')
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_name = #{member_name}, member_email = #{member_email}, member_update_date = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{member_id} AND member_pw = #{member_pw}
